pi_items.source: Task specification and setup_task.sh confirms this path is created and expected

Verified via AutoCAD Color Index standard documentation (https://knowledge.autodesk.com/support/autocad/learn-explore/caas/CloudHelp/cloudhelp/2016/ENU/AutoCAD-Core/files/GUID-14BC039D-238D-4D9E-921B-F4015F96CB54-htm.html) - ACI 1 = Red
Verified via AutoCAD Color Index standard - ACI 2 = Yellow
Verified via AutoCAD Color Index standard - ACI 3 = Green
Verified via AutoCAD Color Index standard - ACI 7 = White/Black
Verifier implementation (verifier.py line 93) uses hardcoded required_terms list that differs from metadata

Task specification requires: 2 vertical rails + 3 horizontal rungs + ~9 component symbols + ~9 text entities = ~23 minimum. Metadata value of 20 is reasonable but slightly conservative. Verifier does not enforce this as a hard requirement.

privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic task requiring manual creation of an electrical motor control ladder diagram in LibreCAD. The DXF file is expected at /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/motor_control_ladder.dxf. Required layer colors use standard AutoCAD Color Index (ACI) values: POWER=1 (Red), RUNGS=2 (Yellow), SYMBOLS=3 (Green), TEXT=7 (White). The task requires at least 20 entities. NOTE: Metadata lists required_text as including 'MOTOR CONTROL', but the verifier checks for 'MOTOR' instead—a discrepancy between specification and implementation.
